about.about1: Welcome to Apartments Sentić, located along the Adriatic coast in beautiful Neum, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Our apartments are an oasis of comfort, offering you a unique opportunity to enjoy incredible nature and peaceful surroundings. Situated right by the shore, our apartments offer spectacular sea views and provide the perfect space to relax and enjoy the wonderful environment.
about.about2: Once a fishing village, Neum is now becoming a destination that delights visitors all year round. In summer, the beaches are ideal for sunbathing and swimming, and the sea offers refreshment and joy. In winter, the town becomes a peaceful haven, perfect for relaxing in the silence of the Mediterranean climate. Walks along the coast and enjoying the simple joys of nature become key elements of your stay in our apartments.
about.about3: Experience unique harmony between nature and accommodation at Apartments Sentić. We offer a homely atmosphere where every moment becomes a special experience. Enjoy the simplicity of life on the Adriatic coast and create lasting memories in Neum.

kitchen.title: Equipped Kitchen

reviews.title: Guest Reviews
reviews.subtitle: What our guests say about us
reviews.review1: Wonderful accommodation with an incredible sea view. The owners are very kind and always available. The apartment is clean and has everything you need. Parking is in front of the house, which is a big advantage. We will definitely be back!
reviews.review2: Perfect location, just a few steps from the beach. The apartment is spacious, modern, and equipped with everything a family needs. Wi-Fi works great, AC is excellent. Highly recommended for a family vacation!
reviews.review3: We spent an unforgettable vacation. The owners are extremely hospitable, the apartment is clean and comfortable. The beach is close, parking is provided, and everything is as it should be. The price is more than fair for what you get. All recommendations!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions our guests ask most often
faq.q1: When is it possible to schedule Check-in and Check-out?
faq.a1: Check-in is possible from 14:00, and check-out is until 10:00. If different times suit you, please contact us and we will do our best to accommodate you.
faq.a2: Yes, each apartment has a secured free parking space directly in front of the building. Parking is safe and available 24/7.
faq.q3: Is it possible to rent a baby cot or a high chair?
faq.a3: Yes, we offer the possibility of renting a baby cot and high chair for an additional fee. Please inform us during reservation so we can provide the equipment.
faq.a4: We are sorry, but pets are not allowed in our apartments to ensure maximum cleanliness and comfort for all our guests.
faq.q5: How far is the beach from the apartments?
faq.a5: A pebble beach is located just a few meters from the property. You can reach the sea on foot in less than a minute.

gallery.title: Apartment Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Take a look at our offer of luxury apartments

apartmans.textA2: Ideally located by the coast, offering a spacious bedroom, comfortable living room, kitchen, and toilet. Perfect for a relaxing stay for four people, with easy access to the sea and no stairs.
apartmans.textA3: The apartment is located on the first floor. It is suitable for three people and includes a large terrace with a sea view. The apartment has a kitchenette, bathroom, double bed, and a sofa.
apartmans.textA4: The apartment is suitable for 4 people. It contains a kitchenette, bathroom, double bed, sofa bed, as well as an outdoor space with a sea view.
apartmans.textA5: Apartment with a separate bedroom, suitable for 4 people. Includes a kitchenette, bathroom, separate bedroom with a double bed, and a living room with a sofa bed. In addition to the interior, an outdoor space with a sea view is available.
apartmans.textA6: Apartment with a separate bedroom, suitable for 4 people. Includes a kitchenette, bathroom, separate bedroom with a double bed, and a living room with a sofa bed. In addition to the interior, an outdoor space with a sea view is available.
apartmans.textA7: Studio apartment suitable for 3 people. Includes a kitchenette, bathroom, double bed, and a sofa. In addition to the interior, an outdoor space is available.
apartmans.textA8: Studio apartment suitable for 4 people. Includes a bathroom, double bed, and a sofa bed. The kitchenette is located in the outdoor area, and the terrace offers a beautiful sea view.
apartmans.textA9: Studio apartment suitable for 2 people. Includes a bathroom and a double bed. The kitchenette is located in the outdoor area, and the terrace offers a beautiful sea view.
apartmans.textA10: Studio apartment suitable for 2 people. Includes a kitchenette, bathroom, double bed, and a standard single bed. In addition to the interior, an outdoor space with a garden view is available.
apartmans.textA11: Studio apartment suitable for 2 people. Includes a kitchenette, bathroom, double bed, and a sofa. In addition to the interior, an outdoor space with a garden view is available.
apartmans.textA12: Studio apartment suitable for 3 people. Includes a kitchenette, bathroom, double bed, and a sofa. In addition to the interior, an outdoor space with a sea view is available.
apartmans.textA13: Studio apartment suitable for 3 people. Includes a kitchenette, bathroom, double bed, and a sofa. In addition to the interior, an outdoor space with a sea view is available.
